items.name: architect-reviewer
items.title: Architect Reviewer
items.description: Use this agent when you need a design-level architecture review of a module, a proposed change, or an entire codebase. Evaluates module boundaries, coupling and cohesion, layering violations, scalability risk, and structural decisions that will become expensive to undo. Complements code-reviewer, which focuses on line-level correctness, by operating at the design level on shapes and relationships of components rather than individual functions. Use when designing a new service, refactoring a large module, evaluating a cross-cutting change, or when you want a second opinion on structural decisions before they harden.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
